name: Abreanna Snodgrass
ai_summary: Abreanna Snodgrass from Augusta, GA has extensive childcare experience raising three young children and her 16-year-old brother, demonstrating strong gentle parenting skills. She is available FT/PT starting the week of the 20th and shows a deep passion for caring for and teaching children.

transcripts.q3:
Hello, good morning. My name is a Brianna Snodgrass. I go by a bee for short. I take care of my three step children. Ages, three two, and one. I also raised my 16 year old brother, from a young age. I've always had a desire to be around children, take care of children, teach children,
 I have had a desire to conceive and have one of my own but that is a struggle that I am currently dealing with. So that makes my love and desire for children even more stronger. I am really excited for this opportunity to be able to work with children and schools around my area. I would be very blessed to have this opportunity. I look forward to speaking with you soon.
transcripts.q4: I am located in Trenton South Carolina, right outside of Aitkin County and about 20-25 minutes from Augusta area.
transcripts.q5: Hello. I have an open schedule, starting the week of the 20th, due to my stepchildren. Going out of state to be with their mother for a little while. I do take care of them full-time, but I'm about to have a couple months free of them, which is a bummer. So I'm looking into taking care of more children, possibly part-time until they come back.
transcripts.q6: Well, I have been raising three young kids, ages, three, two, and one and the older to the three-year-old and two-year-old are brother and sister, so they bicker and argue a lot. I'm all about gentle parenting. So, when I have situations that occur in that kind of situation, I just sit them down and explain to them how it can make the other sibling, fill, and explain to them that it's not, right? And if there's other ways to address problems,
transcripts.q7:
I would make a great up kid teacher, because I have such a great desire to take care of kids and teach parents. I have so much love to get and
 Give out. Sorry. Quite early this morning, I absolutely love children. I love being around children. I love being around other adults that love the same desires. As I do. I'm very responsible and dependable.
